prompt: Kuukikan (空気感) style hyper-realistic film photograph. California evening, golden hour. View from inside a car through the windshield — a suburban California freeway stretches ahead with gentle hills and distant trees. The dashboard shows a CarPlay-like infotainment screen glowing softly with a blurred conversation UI (out of focus). A Japanese man's hands (Kenji — 38 years old, lean, tech-professional look) grip the steering wheel. His wedding ring is visible. The windshield filters the golden sunset light into a warm, diffused glow across the dashboard and his hands. Color grading: golden hour warmth but desaturated in a film-like way — not Instagram-vivid. The freeway landscape has a nostalgic, faded quality. Subtle warmth without excess. Composition: 16:9 wide frame. The windshield view of the sky and road provides massive negative space (upper two-thirds). The CarPlay screen and Kenji's hands are in the lower third. The horizon line sits low. Camera: 28mm wide-angle lens equivalent, f/2.5, ISO 200. Authentic film grain. Slight windshield micro-scratches and dust particles catch the light. Old-lens peripheral softness and subtle vignette. The mood is a quiet commute home — the mundane beauty of a man driving and talking to an AI about dinner. Contemplative, everyday stillness.
negative_prompt: dramatic sunset, lens flare, HDR, oversaturated, CGI, studio lighting, racing, speed, motion blur, night, rain, text overlays, watermarks, logos, AI smoothing, digital painting, anime, cartoon, illustration, face visible
